whatsNew: Added persistent local storage using IndexedDB so uploaded and scanned assets are saved automatically and never lost on app restart!
Added Shift-click range selection! Select one asset, hold Shift, and click another to select all assets in between.
Added interactive update checker in Settings to check, download, or simulate software updates.
improvements: Immediate dismissal of the floating batch actions bar when items are deleted.
Polished user interface with custom indicators.
fixes: Fixed an issue where the batch actions bar remained visible after deleting selected assets.
Fixed file size calculation formatting in the floating status indicator.
